mapper.select: SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, province, city, district, address_detail AS addressDetail, latitude, longitude, tag, is_default AS isDefault, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC, address_id DESC

SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, province, city, district, address_detail AS addressDetail, latitude, longitude, tag, is_default AS isDefault, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user_address WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address(user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, address_detail, latitude, longitude, tag, is_default) VALUES(#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{addressDetail}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{tag}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, tag = #{tag}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_address WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId}
